name: Trek Metals Limited
analysis: TKM's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.1800, stop A$0.1634, target A$0.2000 (1.20:1) — then trail it.
